plan_execution.reasoning: The seller has a large number of products (564), requiring thorough product enrichment. The company profile needs initial validation, especially the website URL which appears to be a Google search link. Reviews agent is skipped as no reviews API URL is provided. Media classification will happen automatically within the product agent. Deduping is crucial for a large product catalog. The quality target is set high due to the nature of the products (pharmaceuticals) and the volume.
